nodes.label: BentaHub Tech Stack
nodes.rationale: Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + Tailwind CSS v4 POS system to replace manual paper operations for the sari-sari store chain.

nodes.label: User Roles
nodes.rationale: Three roles: admin (global cross-branch access), employee (branch-locked cashier+staff functionality), customer (catalog, cart, reservation, pickup). Stored in DB as user_role enum.

nodes.label: Branch Locking Constraint
nodes.rationale: Employees must never query or mutate data belonging to other branches to ensure data isolation and security.

nodes.label: Unwired Middleware Proxy
nodes.rationale: src/proxy.ts is dead/unwired middleware; route and role auth check is done client-side in layouts via useAuth.

nodes.label: Strict Payment Methods
nodes.rationale: Only Cash and GCash payment methods are allowed to prevent scope creep and support efficient storefront operations.

nodes.label: No Delivery Architecture
nodes.rationale: Operations focus purely on walk-in and in-store pickup to avoid delivery logistics and complexity.

nodes.label: Authentication Mechanism
nodes.rationale: JWT via localStorage + Bearer auth headers, backed by HTTP-only auth_token cookie set server-side.

nodes.label: Email Verification Flow
nodes.rationale: 6-digit verification code with 15-minute expiration, SHA-256 hashed in database, max 5 attempts. Logs in dev/sends via SMTP/fallback.

nodes.label: FSD Isolation Principle
nodes.rationale: Enforces self-contained, isolated business modules (features) to keep development clean and prevent spaghetti dependencies.

nodes.label: Database Seeding & Reset
nodes.rationale: pnpm run db:seed resets the database by clearing all tables (users, branches, products, inventory, transactions) before inserting fresh mock data.

nodes.label: Feature Sliced Design Architecture
nodes.rationale: Maintain a clean separation between global shared components and business-logic feature domains. Prevents spaghetti code and tight coupling in React/Next.js projects by restricting cross-feature imports.

nodes.label: Rule of Promotion
nodes.rationale: Starts all code as local-first to prevent premature abstraction. Features are only promoted to the global shared layer once there is an explicit requirement from another feature.

nodes.label: Import Boundary Rules
nodes.rationale: Enforces strict limits on imports: features cannot import other features; shared folders cannot import features. Keeps boundaries clean and maintainable, verified by linter configs.

nodes.label: React Form Action Type Safety
nodes.rationale: Prevents compilation errors during build time. Form actions returning objects can break React type assumptions, so useActionState is preferred for returning validation errors.

nodes.label: DB Caching & Query Patterns
nodes.rationale: Optimizes DB read performance by wrapping queries in dbCache while keeping uncached queries (Internal) private for server-side updates.

nodes.label: API Route Patterns
nodes.rationale: Ensures public endpoints, webhooks, and regional tasks (Edge) are handled securely and performantly. Forbids calling Server Actions directly from API routes.

nodes.label: Zod Schema Patterns
nodes.rationale: Validates user inputs from form structures rather than using raw database schemas. Focuses on user-facing error messages and transformation validation.

nodes.label: Server Action Patterns
nodes.rationale: Provides secure data mutations on the server by checking auth, validating schema inputs, delegating db updates, and handling redirects properly.

nodes.label: Drizzle Schema Definition Patterns
nodes.rationale: Standardizes database layout with UUID primary keys, common timestamps, cascade deletes, and explicit relationships. Keeps DB structure predictable.

nodes.label: Feature Component Patterns
nodes.rationale: Restricts UI forms to use react-hook-form + zod. Leverages useTransition for non-form buttons to manage UI transitions smoothly and prevent double submissions.

nodes.label: Permission System Pattern
nodes.rationale: Aggregates subscription limit checks and RBAC access validation in a centralized permissions file. Gates UI elements using HasPermission component.

nodes.label: Middleware Pattern
nodes.rationale: Leverages clerkMiddleware to protect routes at the edge, ensuring only public routes like sign-in/sign-up/api are accessed without auth.

nodes.label: Task Script Pattern
nodes.rationale: Isolates CLI scripts (executed via tsx) from the main Next.js runtime. Bypasses query cache to update DB tables directly and perform upserts.

nodes.label: Layout & Provider Pattern
nodes.rationale: Configures global providers (Clerk, Toaster) at the root level and designs reusable, style-unified containers for dashboards/auth screens.

nodes.label: Environment Variable Validation
nodes.rationale: Ensures type safety and presence of runtime config by validating env variables using @t3-oss/env-nextjs. Allows build-time bypass with SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION.
